diagrams.description: Four-tier governance model: Objective → Strategy → Tactic → Action with reasoning fields and HITL gates
L0 Observe → L1 Recommend → L2 Approve-to-Execute → L3 Guardrailed Auto with promotion and demotion paths
S-curve: Rapid Acceleration → Tapering → Stabilization with curve shape classifications
PPT × Revenue/Risk/Cost evaluation matrix showing how all three dimensions cross all three value streams
Decision tree for selecting the right skill based on task type
Single agent architecture: inputs → skills + prompts → model routing → actions → HITL → cross-agent events
Evolution from single agent to factory of AI agents, AI+human factories, and factory-of-factories
Five-stage OI operating model: Process Map → Bottleneck ID → Automation Score → Deploy → Measure
Five-layer Antigravity Kit architecture: Agent Context → Reusable Knowledge → Diagram System → Agent Procedures → Automated Quality
